notes: 3.11.05 — PHIEU NHIEU DONG TT 1 PHAN: hien 'Gia tri chi lan nay · Con lai (cong no)' giong phieu 1 dong (yeu cau Sep), 2 cho: (1) Modal '⚡ Tra 1 phan ca phieu': nhan tong theo TUNG TE (R12 khong cong cheo te) nay hien 'Chi lan nay: X · Con lai (cong no): Y' cap nhat truc tiep khi go/chia FIFO; chua nhap thi hien 'Cong no hien tai'.
